title: Escrow Envelope
description: Phase 2 (Escrow) payload. Submitted by the agent to the Bridge server to create an armed escrow session. Contains the manifest hash, module bundle, session metadata, and capability tags.

session_id.description: Unique escrow session identifier (UUID v4). Server-assigned on creation — omit when POSTing to /escrow.

token.description: One-time pull token (nonce). Server-generated on session creation. Omit when POSTing to /escrow.

pipeline_id.description: Pipeline run id, must match the manifest's pipeline_id.

manifest_hash.description: SHA-256 hash of the serialised omc.manifest.json, used by the Bridge to verify integrity.

ttl_seconds.description: Session time-to-live in seconds. After this duration the session is expired and unreachable.

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 expiry timestamp, computed by the Bridge on creation.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the session was created.

modules.description: List of Luau modules to escrow.

manifest.description: The Phase 1 omc.manifest.json object, embedded for traceability and cross-validation.

capability_tags.description: OMC capability tags that describe what this bundle requires from the client.

consumed.description: Whether this session has been consumed (modules pulled). Set by the Bridge server.

consumed_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the session was consumed.

metadata.description: Arbitrary key-value pairs for pack-specific metadata.

module_id.description: Unique identifier for this module, matching the specialist id.

sha256.description: SHA-256 hash of the decoded content (must match manifest entry).

target_path.description: Roblox hierarchy target path for Studio install.
